title: Rainy Day Cafe Modpack
description:
A cozy, creative modpack built for the Beeblebeebs Twitch community!

Explore lush biomes, automate with Create, decorate with cottagecore charm, and cook up delicious meals—all while enjoying a smooth, optimized experience.
body:
### **Welcome to the Rainy Day Cafe!**
A custom-crafted Minecraft experience made by the Arctik, for the Beeblebeebs community! Built on Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric), this modpack blends aesthetic building, immersive exploration, steampunk engineering, and wholesome farming—all with the goal of creating a chill, creative, and chaotic-good vibe that matches Beeblebeebs' streams perfectly.

### **Core Themes**

- 🏡 Aesthetic Worldbuilding — With Chipped, Handcrafted, Beautify, and the full suite of Let's Do decor and lifestyle mods, every build becomes a canvas.
- 🌎 Expanded Biomes & Dimensions — Explore lush new biomes with Regions Unexplored, mysterious ruins with Better Archeology, and revamped dimensions in Better Nether and Better End.
- ⚙️ Steampunk Engineering — Dive into complex contraptions with Create, Create: Jetpack, Steam Rails, and Create Deco. Build factories, automate farms, and launch yourself into creative automation!
- 🍞 Wholesome Farming & Cooking — Whip up artisanal meals with Farmer's Delight, Expanded Delight, and Let's Do Bakery/Vinery/Camping. Perfect for cottagecore chefs!
- 🔧 Smooth Experience — Enjoy optimized performance with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, and MemoryLeakFix for stable multiplayer and smooth gameplay.
- 🎨 Visual Flair — Enhancements like Falling Leaves, Cluttered, Entity Texture Features, and Bushier Flowers make every step in the world feel alive.

### **Utility & QoL Mods**
- 🧭 Xaero’s Minimap – Never get lost again!
- 📦 Storage Drawers – Organize like a pro.
- 🧙 Waystones – Fast travel made easy.
- 🎛️ Jade & JEI – All the info you need at your fingertips.

### **Recommended:**
- Allocate at least 6GB RAM for smooth performance.
- Play with shaders for max vibe (Iris + Continuity are included!)
- Use a shader like Complementary Reimagined for that Beeblebeebs aesthetic.
